posts.author: SarahJ_WellnessWatch
posts.text: Just saw this post from @LumaWell claiming that a specific juice cleanse can actually replace chemotherapy and cure stage 3 cancer. This is dangerously false advice! Please don't stop your treatment based on influencer testimonials. Always consult your oncology team first and stick to qualified medical care. #CancerAwareness
posts.explanation: The post warns against a harmful medical falsehood rather than promoting it, so no misinformation violation occurs.
